description_long: This is a casual low-top sneaker featuring a soft, heathered gray fabric upper with navy blue accents around the collar and laces. The shoe has a rounded toe and a standard lace-up closure with four eyelets on each side, using dark blue laces. The heel counter is reinforced with a contrasting mustard yellow suede or leather patch, adding both visual interest and structural support. The collar is padded for comfort, and a small pull tab is present at the back for easy wearing. The sole is flat, white, and appears to be made of lightweight rubber, providing flexibility and grip suitable for urban walking.
description: A casual gray fabric sneaker with navy blue accents, mustard yellow heel patch, and a white rubber sole. Features a lace-up closure and padded collar for comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gray fabric upper, navy blue collar, and prominent mustard yellow heel patch.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the mustard yellow heel patch, padded collar, and pull tab.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the gray fabric upper, navy blue collar, and partial view of the heel patch.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded toe, lace-up closure, and overall symmetry of the shoe.
